posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Introducing our first apps spotlight with Service Buddy and Teamboard!

If you frequently use monday.com for your Service Management needs, have a look at Service Buddy and Teamboard! On Wednesday, September 13th, at 17:00 EMEA/10 AM EDT, we will have an in depth demo for our community.

During the webinar, you’ll hear from Service Buddy and Teamboard teams on how monday.com users leverage these apps to take their Service Management to the next level. Plus, stick around for a Q&A session, where you can ask questions about how these apps can help you overcome your challenges.

What can these helps with you do?

  1. With Service Buddy, you can streamline your customer service and request processes from start to finish, making it a breeze to manage all Service Management processes within monday.com.

  2. Teamboard helps you maximize productivity and capacity by ensuring your projects are adequately staffed and resourced. You’ll have greater visibility over your entire project, allowing you to identify bottlenecks and constraints in advance.

So why wait? Register now and secure your spot! Don’t miss out on this opportunity to make the most of your monday.com for Service Management.

posts.cookedHtml: Hi any chance of getting a recording please? really interested but this is right over school collection time. Thanks. Siobhan
